items.name_cn:
In stock
Inspired by Brancusi's 20th-century modern sculpture "Bird in Space"
Muse brass handle, unique craftsmanship makes each handle one-of-a-kind, highlighting a precious sculptural feel
The shoulder strap features a metal chain with hardware inlay, adding depth to the bag; the hardware moon god design exudes a premium look
The Sardine handle creates a high-end modern look! The Sardine bag uses Intrecciato weaving to honor the brand's craftsmanship. The handle design creates a strong contrast, presenting an artistic design concept. The finishing of the Muse brass hardware is completed through multiple processes, and exquisite craftsmanship makes each handle unique
Style: 776768
Size: 33*20*4cm (Strap length 35cm)

MIUMIU New Gymnasium Series Handbag
The new Wander Crescent Bag is a collision of colors, eye-catching, sporty yet stylish, perfectly blending sports and fashion. It is a high-level street-stopping essential; the long shoulder strap allows for a crossbody look that is even more playful and cute 🫶

Size: 22x23x7cm (LxHxW)

items.name_en: In stock 💥 Gradient color 🇫🇷🇫🇷🇫🇷 39*42*8cm/3261; Small 35*37*7cm/3260 🆕 New Chanel Black-Silver Gradient! 22 Shopping Bag. Continues the classic quilted pattern and leather chain shoulder strap design. The appearance is simple and focuses on practical functions. The interior has a zip pocket and a removable small bag fixed by spring hooks. The opening is designed with a magnetic snap and a drawstring elastic band, presenting a lazy and casual style. A hollowed-out CHANEL double-C pendant adds a finishing touch. Made of soft and durable original oil-wax leather. The only high-end hardware in the market, the touch is truly invincible, and it is visibly spacious [Okay], it is too suitable as a mom bag, fitness enthusiasts can buy Dimensions:

items.name_cn:
In stock 🔥
Iconic Medium Baguette handbag, fabric material, fully adorned with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, accented with transparent sequins. Adorned with FF buckle. Features front flap, magnetic closure, internal compartment with deep brown fabric lining, zip pocket, and gold metal hardware. The bag comes with a detachable leather handle and shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Size: 26x15.5cm
Style 8600

items.name_en: In stock 🔥 Iconic square Baguette mini bag from the Versace by Fendi series. Gold leather material, featuring gold laser-punched FF pattern, resembling Versace metal mesh. Three Medusa metal pins adorn the front flap. FF closure features a pin. Magnetic closure, FF fabric lined interior compartment, interior pocket, and gold-finish metal hardware. Equipped with a long handle and detachable shoulder strap, for underarm carry or crossbody. 8BS066LM900
